name: openplanet-angelscript-formatter
description: Standalone formatter for Openplanet AngelScript with deterministic brace/indent/spacing rules.

openplanetAngelscriptFormatter.maxBlankL.description: Maximum number of consecutive blank lines kept by the formatter.

openplanetAngelscriptFormatter.trimTrail.description: Trim trailing spaces on each line during formatting.

openplanetAngelscriptFormatter.insertFin.description: Ensure the formatted document ends with a newline.

openplanetAngelscriptFormatter.keepPrepr.description: Keep preprocessor directives at column 0 (no indentation).

openplanetAngelscriptFormatter.blankLine.description: Insert a blank line between consecutive top-level declarations.
